vulnerability.reference: Users uncritically accepting AI-generated text as neutral and accurate without bias detection tools.
vulnerability.generated: End-users have no means to detect or audit subtle quantization-induced distortions, relying implicitly on API output fidelity.

impact.reference: Widespread dissemination of subtly biased content amplifying existing societal inequalities in downstream applications.
impact.generated: Undetected biased or hallucinated text corrupts downstream decisions, spreads misinformation, and erodes user trust in automated services.

dose_response.reference: Post-training quantization of SSM weights and activations induces per-state-group approximation distortion, which in W8A8 SSM inference for cloud NLP services exposes end-users to biased text, leading to uncritical acceptance and amplification of inequalities.
dose_response.generated: Per-state-group quantization distortion in SSM inference, exposed through cloud APIs to end-users, triggers their inability to detect subtle fidelity loss, leading to biased text corrupting downstream decisions and eroding trust.
